chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No.D-3534 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA. No.15904/2019 (Stay) 3. For hearing of main case 25.11.2021 Mr. Muhammad Usman Shaukat, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, DAG along with Mr. Hussain Bohra, Assistant Attorney General ----------------------------------------------------- It is claimed that an order-in-original was challenged before the customs appellate tribunal, which is pending adjudication and during pendency of the said appeal before tribunal, a notice of recovery was issued. This petition is filed to such an extent that till the petitioner exhausts the remedy of appeal before tribunal, no coercive method of recovering the amount on the basis of order-in- original be initiated. Notices were issued and have been served, but no one appeared except learned DAG, who appeared on behalf of the Federation. Thus we deem it appropriate to dispose of this petition with direction that the appeal, which is claimed to be pending before tribunal, be decided at the earliest and till such time the controversy is decided, no coercive action be taken. Petition stands disposed of along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Zahid/*
